paper.disposal_method: Place clean paper in the paper recycling bin. Keep it dry and remove food residue.
paper.recycling_ideas: Turn into handmade crafts, notebooks, or packaging material.
paper.environmental_impact: Recycling paper saves trees and reduces landfill waste.
paper.notes: Soiled paper such as greasy boxes should go to organic waste or trash, not recycling.

metal.disposal_method: Rinse metal items and place them in the metal recycling bin.
metal.recycling_ideas: Reuse for home decor, tools, or small DIY projects.
metal.environmental_impact: Metal recycling saves a lot of energy and reduces mining demand.
metal.notes: Make sure cans and containers are empty before recycling.

organic.disposal_method: Compost organic waste or place it in the green waste bin.
organic.recycling_ideas: Use as compost fertilizer for plants and gardens.
organic.environmental_impact: Composting reduces methane emissions from landfills and enriches soil.
organic.notes: Avoid mixing with plastic or hazardous waste.

hazardous.disposal_method: Bring hazardous waste to a designated collection point or hazardous waste facility.
hazardous.recycling_ideas: Some components may be safely recovered through special recycling programs.
hazardous.environmental_impact: Improper disposal can pollute soil, water, and air.
hazardous.notes: Do not put hazardous waste in regular bins.

textile.disposal_method: Donate wearable items or send damaged textiles to textile recycling.
textile.recycling_ideas: Reuse as cleaning cloths, bags, or patchwork crafts.
textile.environmental_impact: Textile recycling reduces landfill waste and saves resources.
textile.notes: Clean and dry textiles before disposal or donation.

glass.disposal_method: Place clean glass in the glass recycling bin.
glass.recycling_ideas: Reuse as jars, containers, or decorative items.
glass.environmental_impact: Recycling glass saves raw materials and energy.
glass.notes: Separate broken glass carefully and follow local disposal rules.

plastic.disposal_method: Use the plastic recycling bin if accepted by local facilities.
plastic.recycling_ideas: Reuse bottles and packaging for storage or crafts.
plastic.environmental_impact: Plastic recycling reduces pollution, but reuse is better than recycling.
plastic.notes: Empty and rinse containers before recycling.
